en.name: Level 43 — Water World
en.shortDescription: An abandoned aquatic theme park of four linked zones, ending in a flooded final area where aquatic creatures roam free.
en.atmosphere: An eerily quiet park still humming with machinery, choked with fog and disembodied announcements as dread mounts with depth.
en.tips: Don't trigger the corrupted video in the staff halls. Come equipped for hostile entities. Leave at once if you reach the flooded final zone.
